info.title: TaskFlow — Distributed Task Queue System
info.description:
Production-grade distributed task queue system with email campaign engine, real-time monitoring, and advanced workflow orchestration.

## Authentication
All endpoints (except `/health`, `/ready`, `/live`, `/info`, and auth registration/login) require a Bearer JWT token obtained via `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.

## Rate Limiting
Tiered rate limiting is applied per-user and per-IP:
- **Critical endpoints** (auth): 5 req/min
- **Write endpoints** (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE): 30 req/min
- **Read endpoints** (GET): 60 req/min

## Pagination
List endpoints support `skip` (offset) and `limit` (page size, default 20, max 100) query parameters.

## Error Responses
All errors follow the format: `{ "detail": "Error message" }` with appropriate HTTP status codes.
